title: 有馬記念の後に・誰もの心に一輪の

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, the audience is so loud. And they're all
looking at me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I see you all too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I can see every single one of your smiles!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't have done it without everyone
cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you... from the bottom... of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Rice Shower gave the performance of her
life in the ultimate race—a feat that's brought a
smile to everyone's face.
